---
name: Feature request
about: An idea for something Qualia Coding could do
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The need**
What research workflow or analysis are you trying to do that the plugin doesn't currently support? Concrete is better than abstract — "I want to compare codes across waves of interviews" beats "better analytics".

**Proposed solution** (optional)
If you have an idea for how it could work, describe it. Skip this if you're just describing the need.

**Have you considered alternatives?**
Other QDA tools that do this, workarounds you tried, related Qualia features.

**Source format(s) involved**
- [ ] Markdown / PDF / CSV / Parquet / Image / Audio / Video
- [ ] Codebook
- [ ] Analytics
- [ ] Research Board
- [ ] Import / Export (REFI-QDA, tabular)

**Related links** (optional)
Papers, NVivo / ATLAS.ti / MAXQDA features, REFI-QDA spec sections.
